meta_title: Software Development Case Studies | Client Success
meta_description: Our software development projects across different industries, with technology solutions implemented in real-world environments.
title_banner:
Our projects 
 turned into success stories
subtitle_banner:
We have a team with extensive 
experience in various industries:
text_banner: Fintech, insurance, retail, telecommunications, and technology services.
subtitle_stories:
Here we share a bit more about our work 
with some of our clients

customers_stories.title: Retail company
customers_stories.subtitle: Digital services activation platform for a leading U.S. wholesale distributor
customers_stories.context: We partnered with the second-largest wholesale distributor in the United States, focused on selling mobile plans, streaming subscriptions, and TV services through both physical retail stores and digital channels.
customers_stories.challenge: Integrate multiple digital service providers, each operating with different processes and systems, while enabling real-time service activations. The solution needed to ensure a frictionless customer experience and the ability to scale efficiently during peak demand events.

solution.description: We developed a custom software platform featuring a central module, **PAM (Provisioning and Activation Management)**, which integrates point-of-sale systems with digital service providers via APIs. The platform efficiently manages activation and provisioning workflows across both in-store and online channels, ensuring consistency, performance, and operational stability.

customers_stories.impact: The platform became a strategic component of the business, enabling stable operations during high-traffic events such as Black Friday and generating **over $40 million in revenue**. The solution strengthened the distributor’s position as a leading provider of connected digital services in the U.S. market.
implemented: API integrations with digital service providers
Automated activation and provisioning workflows
Support for in-store and online channels
High-availability architecture for peak demand

customers_stories.title: Insurance company
customers_stories.subtitle: Core system modernization for a leading mobile device insurance provider
customers_stories.context: We partnered with a leading mobile device insurance provider in the United States, serving **more than 140 million customers globally**, to modernize the technology platform supporting its core operations.
customers_stories.challenge: The core system was built on a monolithic architecture running on outdated technology nearing end-of-life, limiting the company’s ability to evolve. The challenge was to migrate to a modern architecture without disrupting business operations, while introducing new capabilities aligned with current industry standards.

solution.description: We assembled cross-functional agile teams focused on software engineering excellence and quality assurance. A progressive migration strategy was designed to **transition toward a microservices-based architecture**, enabling the integration of new components while gradually decoupling the legacy system in a controlled and stable manner.

customers_stories.impact: The new architecture eliminated dependency on the legacy system, improved operational resilience, and established a solid foundation for scaling new capabilities. This initiative became a key enabler for a **projected 20% annual revenue growth.**
implemented: Microservices with independent persistence layers
Asynchronous processing through queues and event-driven mechanisms
Distributed error handling and fault management system
Automated testing and end-to-end traceability to ensure quality and stability

customers_stories.title: Data analytics company focused on mobility
customers_stories.subtitle: Scalable advertising monetization platform powered by mobility data
customers_stories.context: We partnered with a leading U.S.-based mobility data and technology company focused on transforming real-world driving data into personalized advertising campaigns. The company operates with high data volumes and strict security and performance requirements.
customers_stories.challenge: Scale a platform capable of processing and monetizing real-time data at large scale, while ensuring full protection of sensitive information and complete technical visibility to optimize advertising performance.

solution.description:
We designed and developed a cloud-native platform on **AWS**, built to dynamically adapt to fluctuating demand. The solution manages ad frequency limits, evaluates campaign effectiveness in real time, and supports variable workloads without compromising performance or stability. 

The backend was engineered with advanced observability capabilities to ensure continuous monitoring, distributed tracing, and detailed system behavior analysis.

customers_stories.impact: The platform transformed mobility data into a sustainable revenue stream, strengthening the company’s ability to innovate in personalized advertising at scale and reinforcing its leadership position in the market.
implemented: Resilient and scalable infrastructure on AWS
High-volume real-time data processing
Structured logging, custom metrics, and distributed tracing
Secure data management with privacy-by-design principles

customers_stories.title: Banco Falabella
customers_stories.subtitle: Launch of a digital consumer loan with instant approval
customers_stories.context: We partnered with one of the most prominent financial institutions in Latin America to launch a fully digital consumer loan product featuring instant approval and disbursement, accessible through both its website and mobile application.
customers_stories.challenge: Design and implement a solution capable of evaluating, approving, and disbursing loans in real time, while integrating critical external systems and ensuring high standards of security, regulatory compliance, and user experience.

solution.description:
We developed an end-to-end platform connecting web and mobile channels with key services such as national identity verification systems and credit bureaus, enabling automated validation and risk assessment processes. The architecture was designed to ensure agility, reliability, and scalability, supporting mission-critical financial workflows without operational friction. 

Additionally, we implemented continuous improvements in payment platform management and credit card–related processes, strengthening the institution’s overall digital operations.

customers_stories.impact: The solution enabled the institution to offer a fast, secure, and fully digital consumer loan experience, strengthening its position in digital banking and significantly enhancing the customer experience.
implemented: Integration with national identity verification systems and credit bureaus
Web platform and mobile application for loan application and management
Secure, automated workflows for evaluation, approval, and instant disbursement
Optimization and support of payment platforms and credit card management processes

customers_stories.title: Pycca
customers_stories.subtitle: POS system modernization for a retail company
customers_stories.context: We worked with one of the largest retailers in Ecuador to redesign its POS system, a key platform for in-store operations and sales management. The goal was to modernize the technology solution by incorporating new visual and technical capabilities that would improve the user experience and optimize operational processes at the point of sale.
customers_stories.challenge: The organization needed to evolve its POS system toward a more modern and flexible architecture, capable of operating both online and offline, integrating with different peripherals and external services, and supporting business growth without replacing the existing database or disrupting store operations.

solution.description: We designed a comprehensive redesign of the POS platform, implementing a modern architecture based on PWA and progressively migrating to cloud-based microservices. This approach made it possible to maintain operational continuity while introducing new technological capabilities and improving the overall user experience of the system.

customers_stories.impact: The modernization of the POS system strengthens in-store operations and improves efficiency in one of the most critical areas of the retail business: sales management and customer interaction. With a more stable, connected platform prepared for both online and offline operation, the company optimizes service times, improves operational control, and establishes the foundation for a faster and more consistent shopping experience.
implemented: PWA architecture for online and offline operation.
Progressive migration to cloud-based microservices.
Integration with in-store peripherals and external services.
Modernization of the POS system’s visual and technical capabilities.
Platform evolution while maintaining the existing database.

customers_stories.title: Seguros Bolívar
customers_stories.subtitle: Integrated mobile platform for one of Colombia’s largest insurance providers
customers_stories.context: We partnered with one of the largest insurance providers in Colombia to develop a mobile platform designed to integrate key services for both customers and non-customers. The objective was to centralize roadside assistance, health tracking, and home services within a unified digital experience.
customers_stories.challenge: Develop a scalable mobile application capable of consolidating multiple services into a single platform, ensuring interoperability between legacy and modern systems while delivering a secure, seamless, and reliable experience even under high-demand scenarios.

solution.description:
We designed a cloud-based, end-to-end solution connecting multiple services through microservices and API integrations. The platform was built with a strong focus on scalability, resilience, and user experience, ensuring operational continuity and high performance. 

A multidisciplinary team aligned engineering, architecture, and UX design to deliver a stable implementation prepared for future evolution.

customers_stories.impact: The mobile application transformed how the insurer delivers assistance, health tracking, and home services, establishing a reliable and efficient digital experience. This initiative strengthened the company’s market positioning and accelerated its broader digital transformation strategy.
implemented: Scalable AWS infrastructure managed with Terraform
Mobile application built with Ionic and a microservices-based architecture
Serverless processing using AWS Lambda
Integration of key APIs such as Google Maps
Integration with external platforms such as Dacadoo to enhance wellness services
Agile methodologies applied throughout the development lifecycle

customers_stories.title: Seguros Bolívar
customers_stories.subtitle: Core system modernization for a leading insurance provider
customers_stories.context: We partnered with one of the country’s leading insurance providers to rebuild its core system, a platform with more than 25 years of evolution that was beginning to limit the organization’s ability to adapt to the demands of a digital market. The company needed to modernize its technology architecture, optimize critical processes, and enable new customer-centric capabilities.
customers_stories.challenge: Progressively replace a highly coupled legacy system without disrupting business operations, while building a modern architecture capable of delivering greater agility, operational efficiency, and innovation capacity.

solution.description: We designed and implemented a new modular, scalable architecture, migrating legacy components to modern technologies and cloud environments. The transformation was guided by distributed architecture principles and user-centered design, ensuring that technological evolution remained aligned with the organization’s strategic business objectives.

customers_stories.impact: The new architecture is establishing the foundation for a more agile, cost-efficient, and secure core operation. The insurer will be able to launch digital products faster and consolidate its transition toward a fully digital, customer-centric operating model.
implemented: Microservices-based architecture
Progressive migration to cloud infrastructure
Advanced analytics-enabled components
Redesign of digital processes with a user experience focus
Secure and automated development practices
